hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+push.*(-f|--force)' && { echo '{"block": true, "message": "Blocked force push. Ask Austin first."}' >&2; exit 2; } || true

echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\bgh\s+(pr\s+create|pr\s+merge|pr\s+review|auth|issue\s+create|release\s+create|repo\s+create)' && { echo '{"block": true, "message": "gh write commands are blocked on this machine — use the github MCP."}' >&2; exit 2; } || true
for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *.md) FILES="$f" bash -c 'true' 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; done
